seoTitle: Broadway vs Brocklehurst — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Broadway and Brocklehurst. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Broadway and Brocklehurst.
heading: Broadway vs Brocklehurst — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Broadway, New South Wales and Brocklehurst, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Brocklehurst has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Broadway (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Broadway or Brocklehurst safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Broadway has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Brocklehurst scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Broadway scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Brocklehurst scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Broadway or Brocklehurst?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Brocklehurst has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
